name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt For Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We are now less than 30 days away from Election Day and the outpouring of support we are receiving in the 7th District shows me that we are on the right track. I want to thank the more than 50 7th District residents who volunteered their time yesterday to join the Team Hunt Day of Action. From phone banking to block walking and everything in between, your engagement is integral to the success of our campaign and we are humbled by your support. You are helping us build unstoppable momentum that will carry us across the finish line in November.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=75fe40d3f74d4aa4823d8978348e92b3&_e=gZnGdk7QS1Rb-oN7ei2po95Mmt___vXWJ6Epn1DjLbJwvBpXbSi_-7zY-sZK6S8-BxDXxe63RzoSwsQZ4T6Y-G7RJUk7V95DdJSju6Wn9mMUv_ub2A8P-Ks-ZB1mMDcGWG3txhOHJz0dfOIHyt8H4Mq3uSRDD5C-TzE2imAfFx8RODPcA9oG3oWwiUS3TvqA_VvH2c1XA_W7PlbIzc0dQkBSNcsOFZy93ec2bfKmjqXUJqGCEusnFFjn3fAdNXUQPt-dO2X21VA_EHKbYFXwYTY8eJ8-mvWN8UtWwanp9vI9CkZQHFRNBV1_RasspGtU)

On Tuesday, I was honored to receive Senator Joan Huffman’s formal endorsement of my campaign. Houston urgently needs thoughtful representation at every level of government. I look forward to working with Senator Huffman to ensure the needs of interests of Texans come first.

On Wednesday, I released a new TV advertisement, [_Not Moderate_](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=75fe40d3f74d4aa4823d8978348e92b3&_e=gZnGdk7QS1Rb-oN7ei2po95Mmt___vXWJ6Epn1DjLbJwvBpXbSi_-7zY-sZK6S8-mFjqZE_zB4o4rb1HDNskzCCt3E5jrbdEMcX4tC929ZLG_8URvszAY_ZtxTjaLMN5KfrP1_Zb1FeUc51uPd42Oo-WM5ptN1hqla-sMsEaRDvzgoy9v2Bx1uvaFRsNoi6x3c4x3dPcK1mBVPLlf3CAthMA4k7VClG2_RmQyL8IZ2-X16w8Pzf_t4RqIxHoRtRlF1BnaOl351-jQapzEazjslYM_QIQhtChV6F1ZnfVSUxlB8wUqpSkNrQ0VkESsm92). When my opponent campaigned for Congress in 2018, she promised to be an independent voice for Houston. Instead, she has increasing gravitated toward the far-left extremes of her party and has even voted with Nancy Pelosi over 99% of the time. As your Congressman, I will be sure you have a voice in Washington, and that your needs are the foremost priority.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=75fe40d3f74d4aa4823d8978348e92b3&_e=gZnGdk7QS1Rb-oN7ei2po95Mmt___vXWJ6Epn1DjLbJwvBpXbSi_-7zY-sZK6S8-mFjqZE_zB4o4rb1HDNskzCCt3E5jrbdEMcX4tC929ZINFwpsy4apmAPI4Tqz0Azt-A711mmLNO3Pm9oXZKlYuhkruwHS8yVnbMWirVOExuPs0FUlSuWOfKJX2f5z9ZF0GC1PO66VuV59xZdetySfcx7byJVN-Ax9DURPaRED8fJbXyr5-OmMqmqkj7MGflyAL8dP64vNmoh_6mEKtrWmOhXj_PKivZGOozCywwRVdukh2M0oqCLmvRilVtudANkh)

On Thursday, I was humbled to announce that our campaign raised nearly $3 million in the third quarter. This incredible fundraising milestone is a testament to the enthusiasm we are generating in the 7th District and further affirms our mission to bring new leadership to Houston. I want to thank all of the individuals who have put their trust in our campaign and who have contributed their hard-earned dollars. We will continue to work every day to earn your support.

Today, I was honored to receive the endorsement of Council Member Greg Holden in my campaign in the 7th District. I look forward to working with local leaders like Council Member Holden to build a brighter, opportunity-rich future for all Houstonians. Thank you for your support, Council Member Holden.

As we gear up for early voting, if you would like a yard sign or are interested in learning more about how you can engage with our campaign efforts, please contact any member of the Hunt Campaign. We are so appreciative to have you on our team. Our campaign would not be possible without you.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=75fe40d3f74d4aa4823d8978348e92b3&_e=gZnGdk7QS1Rb-oN7ei2po9-VU6aSHwLY2Ut_ppmXUKPfMaL2hVnvoxebii88Lt1GsgGJFfnm5vMFl4u7iA9hqqZEslkX4yBnaCxwR-GPP07j_hglRdxZ0uFeLzjqgA261z3eM2MRJBbiRYdRWjJDjwBgYHvNHRyyFDN8xHQOGSrXBg9M0ul44tRJe4eUrWtT9FPVOjjp_C8nBu3vOkvKMBeZvc2yoPweFiuMh1n_ribSdHS5nBee2hzAqyfx0mDncS2dP1Bjx1L6v4WqyVKqnRbqHtJeQ4qDwvAFjQlfM2U%3D)****
---

---

Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=75fe40d3f74d4aa4823d8978348e92b3&_t=3LQ2UZD6KigAQ4x6Z81XLcn44AMmzu3MRuogu823bj88tZo8zI5F4BX1s-HOIBjrOauOTuQziqiJw9UigRyhcaaJjXtBG4rqANfpTRm-4Zp41Gi1oDWofhZ1ZxtXVKLzXlclp_ARjj-lch8tPzM_Kdq14dXWYZoeHoNmhHRnp_Y%3D).

name: President Trump's Video
subject: He’s still going.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=26e5056c03afd1967d2d86d6974320d7108e9cc3c77f53dfe7bf4738b3f04c7d55f7bba7c24ce267559296d965572d9528301cda366056bc

Friend,

As the leader of the free world, President Trump had no choice. He didn’t want to stay in the White House and lock himself in, away from the American People.

Anyone who knows our President knows he couldn’t do that - it’s not who he is. This is the greatest and most powerful Country in the world and he couldn’t sit back while this was going on. He needed to go forward and lead our Nation and confront this unprecedented challenge head-on.

Even now, he’s making sure YOU are taken care of.

OFFICIAL MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=26e5056c03afd1967d2d86d6974320d7108e9cc3c77f53dfe7bf4738b3f04c7d55f7bba7c24ce267559296d965572d9528301cda366056bc

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=26e5056c03afd1967d2d86d6974320d7108e9cc3c77f53dfe7bf4738b3f04c7d55f7bba7c24ce267559296d965572d9528301cda366056bc
STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>

President Trump has been fighting to Keep America Safe for months. His top priority is developing and distributing a vaccine to our Nation’s most vulnerable, and then to all American Patriots so that life can get back to normal.

This is only possible if we re-elect President Trump for four more years, which is why we’re coming to you now. The Election is less than a month away and the President is counting on your support to WIN BIG.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Confirm Amy, GOTV, & more! Week of Oct. 5th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
The left is going all out to stop Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination and to lie, cheat, and steal their way into the White House. We have very little time to fight them, so please do all that you can this week!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**Please note:** _If you live in a state in reasonable travel distance of Washington, DC,**we need you to show up on October 12th** to show support for Amy Coney Barrett._ The left is going to have a presence and we need to show up to show Republican Senators that the America people expect them to do their jobs and confirm Judge Barrett to the Supreme Court without delay. We cannot be more serious when we say we need patriots to show up on Monday, October 12, 2020 in Washington, DC, to ensure Republican Senators are emboldened. More details will be released this week on when and where to meet up. We’re calling on you New York, New Jersey, Maryland, Virginia, West Virginia, Delaware, Connecticut, Rhode Island, Massachusetts, and New Hampshire! In the meantime, please complete this form to let us know if you can make it!
[RSVP TO SHOW UP IN DC](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvaFlaRHdDZEJtcGE5bVIxTkE_bWlkPTQyNzU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=ptZ8W601o8c0dKtDbFW1HA)
|
---
Supreme Court Action
**Weekly Sign Waving Events Now**
The left is going to be out in the streets protesting against Amy Coney Barrett and President Trump, as well as the onslaught from the mainstream media. Please organize sign/flag waving events now and get them on people’s calendars now. If you live near a local Senate office, hold the event outside of the office. If you don’t live near one, hold the event at a busy intersection or another location where there is a lot of traffic going by.

Your sign waving might be some of the only pro-Trump and pro-Barrett messaging that people in your community see. We’ve noted which days have things happening that day. Otherwise, make the event a “Confirm Amy” theme and/or pro-Trump theme, or a flag waving event. If Judge Barrett is confirmed at some point, we will update you with messaging for these events.
* This Thursday, October 8th
* Monday, October 12th
* Thursday, October 15th
* Thursday, October 29th
* Monday, November 2nd

Sample Amy Coney Barrett Sign Messages:
* Fill the Seat Now!
* Confirm Amy Coney Barrett now!
* Amy Coney Barrett loves the Constitution! Fill the Seat Now!
* #ConfirmAmy
* America supports Amy Coney Barrett!

**Call your Republican Senator About the Supreme Court**
To call your Senators, no matter the party, simply dial [(202) 224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNDMxMjE_bWlkPTQyNzU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=2aPriAS04YAXaYgKSTW63Q "tel:2022243121") and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the name and party of your Senators, [use the map on this page](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5zZW5hdGUuZ292L3N0YXRlcy9zdGF0ZXNtYXAuaHRtP21pZD00Mjc1OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=gOYQ9vpqu2SDNxaPTzTLQw). Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators.
* **Call your Republican Senator(s) and tell them to Fill the Seat Now, before the election.** Tell them to stay strong against the attacks from the left, and that the American people will have their backs.

_**Sample Script**_
_“Hi, my name is [Your Name], and I live in [City, State]. I’m calling to urge the Senator to support Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination and to confirm her quickly before the election. Thank you!”_

* **Call your Democrat Senator(s) and tell them to meet with Amy Coney Barrett.** Right now, Democrats are refusing to even meet with her. This is unacceptable.

_**Sample Script**_
_“Hi, my name is [You Name], and I live in [City, State]. I’m calling to urge the Senator to meet with Amy Coney Barrett. It is unacceptable to refuse to meet with her and defies precedent and norms. Thank you.”_

**Sign up for our Supreme Court Action Coalition Group**
If you received an email last week with a notice that we are reactivating the Trump Defense Team/Fight Impeachment group, then you are already on this email list. If you didn’t receive that email, then you will want to make sure you get signed up for the coalition group that will work to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee. You will receive emails with messaging, news, action items, and more that are specific to this Supreme Court seat fight. **[Sign up here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ncm91cHMuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9hL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZvcnVtLz9taWQ9NDI3NTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIyFmb3J1bS9zY290dXNkZWZlbmRlcnMvam9pbg&K=8v7POcW0TplgEFcOZpKOsQ)**
|
---
Get Out the Vote Action
There is less than one month until the election! We have no time to waste!

**Please sign up for one or more Get Out The Vote efforts (texting, calling, or mailing letters), and get every Trump voter you know to sign up too!**
[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvZ1lhdGE2eDJLNktGSkx0SEE_bWlkPTQyNzU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=P0kWTcJD_DfLlmZ3eoHRzA)
|
---
Sign Up to be a Poll Worker OR Help Someone Else Sign Up
There is still a drastic shortage of poll workers. [Use our very short How-To Guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI3NTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=RhIiMEQYcBFQKw37SNwsHQ) to help you figure out if you are eligible and how to sign up.

**Note that NOW is the time to be signing up because there are usually trainings that you must be able to go through, and there will be deadlines for completing those trainings.**

Also, in many states, teens can sign up to be poll workers. Since many kids aren’t in school right now, get them to help! Plus, in most states, poll workers get paid, and what teen doesn’t want a little extra money?

If you can’t be a poll worker because of health issues, you might be able to help someone else sign up by offering to watch their kids. Again, since many kids aren’t in school right now, there might be parents who want to sign up, but need help watching their kids for the day.
[DOWNLOAD HOW-TO GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI3NTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=z_XpieK8qdqTWCehcanTdA)
|
---
Pledge to Vote in Person
The number one way we can stop the election from being stolen is to get as many voters to vote in person as possible, where it is appropriate. Therefore, if you are able, please sign this pledge to vote in person, and then make sure to do it!

**NOTE:** If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you. We’ve also heard from an activist in New Jersey who said that in NJ, the situation may be different, so be sure to reach out to other activists in your state to see what they are saying about the best way to vote in your state.
[PLEDGE TO VOTE IN PERSON](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlaW5wZXJzb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDI3NTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_gJ1w1RrVmSdQVzth0UIsA)
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of October 5th
This week, we are taking a look at the Founders’ thoughts on the judiciary and the concept of “judicial supremacy.” As we are, yet again, in a Supreme Court seat battle, we thought it was a good time to learn about the Founders’ intents when it came to the courts.

With your family, read through this report from The Heritage Foundation, titled, [“Against Judicial Supremacy: The Founders and the Limits on the Courts.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc5LWJhYjQ1NjVlODUxZjRjMWU4YjEwMWY4ZTFmYTc5MDJm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvdXJ0cy9yZXBvcnQvYWdhaW5zdC1qdWRpY2lhbC1zdXByZW1hY3ktdGhlLWZvdW5kZXJzLWFuZC10aGUtbGltaXRzLXRoZS1jb3VydHM_bWlkPTQyNzU5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=5-hmvJ6WagnChVSN_MNK7Q)

Here is the summary of the report:
_Americans’ contemporary understanding of judicial power is inconsistent with the argument put forward by Hamilton and Madison in The Federalist. Although The Federalist affirms the power of judicial review—and hence the role of the judiciary as a check on the other branches—it does not present this as the first or most important function of the courts. Moreover, The Federalist does not support the vast implications of judicial review as including a power to decide the great moral issues of the times and to adjust the Constitution to trends in public opinion. Finally, The Federalist lends no aid to the belief that the Supreme Court is the ultimate interpreter of constitutional meaning, unanswerable for its interpretations to any authority but itself._
While it remains important – critical, even – to confirm originalist, constitutionalist judges to all levels of the judiciary, it is equally important that we understand and teach our kids and grandkids about the role that the Founders actually intended for the judiciary.

Turn the “key takeaways” at the start of the report into questions to discuss as a family:
1. How was The Federalist’s understanding of the judicial power significantly more circumscribed than is understood by many Americans today?
2. Why is this original account of judicial power more consistent with republican self-government and the sovereignty of the American people?
3. Discuss the idea that Congress may rightly discipline the judiciary by impeaching and removing from office judges who abuse the judicial power, and how that would affect the future of the American experiment.

|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

Friend,

I’m humbled by the support you’ve shown me over the past few months. Thanks to supporters here on the Suncoast, across Florida, and around the country — **we raised more than $1.1 million for the fundraising quarter, which is more than double what our campaign has raised in any previous quarter!**

What makes this big news even more impressive is that I haven’t taken a single dollar from corporate PACs — it’s all thanks to people like you who contributed what they could to help me flip this seat from red to blue.

**Vern Buchanan is so concerned about our campaign’s fundraising progress, not only is he taking tons of money from corporate PACS, he has been forced to loan his campaign money _repeatedly_ — and with less than a month until Election Day he will undoubtedly try to prop up his lagging campaign with his own money again.**

**[That’s where you come in, friend. Peter, **I 've got BIG news!** **The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC) has targeted our race as one of their nationally highlighted _[Spotlight Races](https://act.myngp.com/el/5O2WJRedQRt-BcB3q2b8DKJFAUulqv_MgdLulmYVgec=/DeT6b4V_EmbiTkZuXveim6uX8H3_ckxz6EOgIc3TJGg=) \-- one of the key state races across the country that can flip an important seat!_** [**____**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5O2WJRedQRt-BcB3q2b8DKJFAUulqv_MgdLulmYVgec=/2Mg6pait72MoPVDvmXBIIdMF-Cr3NNBcvgoOHqwL1ek=) The DLCC targets legislative races across the country they know we can win, because rebuilding our country will start from the ground up-- in our local elections. We got this critical endorsement because of our team's hard work, polling that has me neck and neck with my opponent, and incredible support from people like you. body:
Texas has registered over 1.5 million new voters since Election Day in 2016. Now, it’s the job of every campaign to identify these folks and make sure they know what’s at stake up and down the ballot.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19939813/255042789/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201005GOTV_TK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmM4M2ZkYi0yMjA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6cCxEmjmL5nFqc3Q1Ka7og7uGJx3NFCbJBU5vaSxjQ=)
---

Texas has registered _over 1.5 million new voters_ since Election Day in 2016. Now, it’s the job of every campaign to identify these folks and make sure they know what’s at stake up and down the ballot. We’ve already seen that Texans run as far as they can from disgraced former congressman Pete Sessions once they find out about his disastrous record in Washington. **And now, with so many new voters, we have to make sure Sessions can’t trick them into thinking he’s in their court.[_Can you chip in to help us elect Rick Kennedy and defend Texas from Sessions' dangerous agenda?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19939815/255042792/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201005GOTV_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmM4M2ZkYi0yMjA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6cCxEmjmL5nFqc3Q1Ka7og7uGJx3NFCbJBU5vaSxjQ=)** Voters need to know he was implicated in a scheme to funnel Russian money into GOP campaigns. They need to know he works every day to end the Affordable Care Act and take away coverage from people with pre-existing conditions. And they need to know that he willingly traded his vote in Congress for campaign cash from corporate PACs. His only goal is to gain power, keep it, and use it for his own benefit. **Rick has a chance to stop him from returning to Washington.** **We’re neck and neck in a recent poll, and the massive influx of new voters could turn the tide in our favor. But that means we have to run the most robust voter turnout effort this district has ever seen.[_Can you chip in just $15 to help us today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19939816/255042793/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201005GOTV_TK_all_xx_l2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmM4M2ZkYi0yMjA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6cCxEmjmL5nFqc3Q1Ka7og7uGJx3NFCbJBU5vaSxjQ=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | **[Donate $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19939818/255042795/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201005GOTV_TK_all_xx_abx15&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmM4M2ZkYi0yMjA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6cCxEmjmL5nFqc3Q1Ka7og7uGJx3NFCbJBU5vaSxjQ=)**

subject: Over 8,000 ballots have already been cast
body:
8,728 people have already early voted here in the Illinois 16th. That’s 8,728 voters who have made their choice and set it in stone. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/51085d82d993/over-8000-ballots-have-already-been-cast?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
8,728 people have already early voted here in the Illinois 16th. That’s 8,728 voters who have made their choice and set it in stone. This cycle, we need to reach voters sooner than we have in years past, and make sure they have everything they need to cast their vote early, by mail, or on Election Day safely and securely.

[Chip in so that we can get our message to the voters before they make their final decision.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2773d77280&e=140a9b81e7)

**Flipping the Illinois 16th from red to blue is crucial in securing and expanding the Democratic House majority. **It’s important that we get progressives elected so that we can accomplish real change for the working people of this country. Our opponent, however, only stands for his corporate PAC donors. He opposes campaign finance reform since he is funded by corporate PACs. He opposes protections for preexisting conditions since he has taken over $300k from Big Pharma. And he opposes reproductive rights since his party tells him to.

The people of northern Illinois deserve a representative who will fight for them. **And we can do so much better.** To do that, we need to broadcast our message ASAP.

Your contribution will help us buy more ads, hire another organizer for our team, and help get Dani out across this big district. [Can I count on you to help us reach early voters?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1c7bce52d9&e=140a9b81e7)

Nick Pigeon (yup, like the bird!)
Field Director, Team Dani
---

name: Clarke Tucker
subject: Making sure you're registered to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3CIDaA_VFWjo6Muj3ji-Rd-AfG3pD_7kkiAd3dyJSA=/PhWrJcXulXUEKPWHSe9Kw0s52TMcFpskm42Jb0G5ZCE=)

Friends -

Today is the LAST day to register to vote in Arkansas in time for the 2020 election.

There is so much on the line in this election -- both at the national level and also at the state and local levels. Our families' health care; our children's education; our economic recovery; the very future of our planet.

That's why I am asking you to [check your voter registration status right now at this link.](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3CIDaA_VFWjo6Muj3ji-Rd-AfG3pD_7kkiAd3dyJSA=/3kmL1u2l44hZu_SCINbrTk4LqziMwKvZNtuCcx0HZ5I=) If you're already registered, then please [send this link](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3CIDaA_VFWjo6Muj3ji-Rd-AfG3pD_7kkiAd3dyJSA=/3kmL1u2l44hZu_SCINbrTk4LqziMwKvZNtuCcx0HZ5I=) to your friends and family who may not be registered and encourage them to do so.

We are just 29 days away from Election Day, and just 15 days away from the start of Early Voting in this historic election. Please make sure you have a plan to vote!

Thanks, and talk soon.

Clarke

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3CIDaA_VFWjo6Muj3ji-Rd-AfG3pD_7kkiAd3dyJSA=/PhWrJcXulXUEKPWHSe9Kw0s52TMcFpskm42Jb0G5ZCE=)

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
---
Clarke Tucker for State Senate
PO Box 7268
Little Rock AR 72217 United States
[Forward To A Friend](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3CIDaA_VFWjo6Muj3ji-Rd-AfG3pD_7kkiAd3dyJSA=/I_rn85gunVZTiDdtoAq0qTMr2waSGL3AyaU5GVr_8rE=)
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/q3CIDaA_VFWjo6Muj3ji-Rd-AfG3pD_7kkiAd3dyJSA=/hC0VP4yhlmivSA6z01napJNa2QvsVdoA-SX99AY0qII=).

name: Mary Jennings (MJ) Hegar
subject: 🗳TEXAS VOTER REGISTRATION DEADLINE IS TODAY!🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Make your voice heard!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ca6/7f51f7bc/4492c343/4efba6e6/2536248746/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Today is the voter registration deadline in Texas, Peter!

I don't have to tell you how important this election is for the future of Texas. So much is on the ballot this year. Make sure your friends and family are **registered** and get out to **VOTE** this November 3!

**Remember, y'all, there's no one coming to save us -- we are the cavalry.**

The stakes could not be higher for Texans and our country. This election is about _our health care_ , _the future of the Supreme Court_ , and _electing leaders who are ready to fight for Americans,_ not special interests.

**[Texas voters start going to the polls next week -- can you chip in now so that I can reach as many people as possible before they cast their ballots?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ca6/7f51f7bc/4492c343/4efba6e5/2536248746/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201005.1ndnat__2242__&amount=10")**

This election is a damn big deal and it seems some representatives -- like Sen. Cornyn -- have forgotten that Texans elect them, not special interests! We need to finish our campaign out strong and remind them who's in charge -- **which is why I'm asking you to chip in to our campaign NOW.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

|

| | Hey everyone, I wanted to reach out and let you know about a big moment in our race — **Josh’s first (and maybe only) debate of the campaign with Andy Barr is _tonight_!** We’ve asked Andy Barr to join us in five debates, so that voters can hear from both candidates about where they stand on the important issues facing the district. A month after Josh issued that proposal, Barr has still not responded, and has agreed to only tonight’s debate. You can watch the showdown on CW Lexington (channel 27.2) or livestream the event on their website. Here are the details: **WHAT** : Kentucky Sixth District Congressional Debate with Josh Hicks and Rep. Andy Barr, hosted by the League of Women Voters and WKYT and moderated by Bill Bryant
**WHERE** : Live on CW Lexington or online at [**_https://www.wkyt.com/livestream2/_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19947977/255077867/2030064187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRkNWU2ZS0zZTA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aODaWLiHD4Ld4z0mg4nr807TNQwCwsk0ilDIso1z5UI=&emci=f305f599-3507-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=55dd5e6e-3e07-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662)
**WHEN** : Monday, October 5, from 7:00 to 8:00 pm ET And if you miss it — don't worry! You can watch the recording on WKYT’s website the next day, and we’ll be sure to share clips on Josh’s _**[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19947978/255077868/-1082575601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRkNWU2ZS0zZTA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aODaWLiHD4Ld4z0mg4nr807TNQwCwsk0ilDIso1z5UI=&emci=f305f599-3507-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=55dd5e6e-3e07-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662)**_ and [_**Twitter**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19947979/255077869/209776233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRkNWU2ZS0zZTA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aODaWLiHD4Ld4z0mg4nr807TNQwCwsk0ilDIso1z5UI=&emci=f305f599-3507-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=55dd5e6e-3e07-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=15601662) accounts. Hadley Rouse
Outreach Manager | | [**contribute **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19947980/255077870/-1276090683?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201005debatepreview_TH_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWRkNWU2ZS0zZTA3LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aODaWLiHD4Ld4z0mg4nr807TNQwCwsk0ilDIso1z5UI=)

Our need to back the blue has never been more apparent.
Democrats have been silent as mobs have encouraged and perpetrated violent riots in cities across America.

And they’ve embraced the radical “defund the police” movement.

Jeanne Shaheen's silence means she can’t be trusted to call out her own party. She can’t be trusted to back the blue — and if Democrats take control of the Senate and White House, she will do nothing to stop the “defund the police” movement.

I won’t cave to violent mobs — and I will ALWAYS BACK THE BLUE. _**[Chip in now to help me hold career politicians and liberals like Jeanne Shaheen accountable for refusing to support law enforcement!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f07c1ae93987d029/f055e48bf0c1d86ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ [🚓 BACK THE BLUE! name: Darin LaHood
subject: Do we follow the Constitution or the Left?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
We knew that filling RBG’s seat wouldn’t be easy – but the Left only wants to make it impossible | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e60734b55d7d49f99f811b5e6116191e&_e=AUDgQI7jzmmy2T98Jxi25gAnlZppvoAV3TDX5o95ecZsVq6l3-_CVIHASCfbd1MfoBY0pf9TTbbTzD2gEKjG4_yBv4-rx2LPVUUYZaYmm9lEaU7s4_bgcHjBBvJ41TF9DGwvo4Ndvn79e8pak8pB9QgyoQ9TxhdEddtr0zYtvSUh4c1Ta3cNCfog12bBvOXZQH5ddZ_kWgJKSvPYJOocWy77778O6TB53Bo0oNKwTodMCu1FVhZMDuk2iAJDDrp8BvWgaOZ8yd_SExqqE-VH4m01RYHkJnvUTJYVU7_iiLSdCG-uaLltHYpcBvwokEGJTJPtOePbF-THbVppzgL4J0pUly3kww6k7n3issCzqrWxLlDyYBAOj6mv7WHs6I0lDtqrJ6NlOurzE4h45Xl1zdk0ND3VWp7e5ceyivRQEowphrZBN2CoN46g6eOA49nt5VVHlIpRdT7cm721pnrMki1BtB4uzQiQWwdhR3txI3U%3D)
|
---
Friend,

When America lost Justice Ruth Bader Ginsberg last month, we knew right away that filling her seat wouldn't be an easy task.

**The Left’s obstruction is only making it even more difficult.**

President Trump had every Constitutional right to nominate Judge Amy Coney Barrett to fill the Supreme Court vacancy and the Republican-led Senate has every right to confirm her nomination – in whatever time frame they choose.

_That hasn’t stopped Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi from threatening another baseless impeachment or even threatening to pack the Supreme Court in any attempt to stand in the way of what the Constitution says we should do at a time like this._

**Friend, what do you think? Should we follow the Constitution – or the Left?**

The stakes couldn’t be any higher for the future of the Supreme Court, and we cannot afford to let political games get in the way of this decision.

clean_body: We knew that filling RBG’s seat wouldn’t be easy – but the Left only wants to make it impossible | | | Friend, When America lost Justice Ruth Bader Ginsberg last month, we knew right away that filling her seat wouldn't be an easy task. The Left’s obstruction is only making it even more difficult. President Trump had every Constitutional right to nominate Judge Amy Coney Barrett to fill the Supreme Court vacancy and the Republican-led Senate has every right to confirm her nomination – in whatever time frame they choose. That hasn’t stopped Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi from threatening another baseless impeachment or even threatening to pack the Supreme Court in any attempt to stand in the way of what the Constitution says we should do at a time like this. Friend, what do you think? Should we follow the Constitution – or the Left? The Supreme Court is gearing up to take on a number of landmark cases which will decide the fate of Obamacare, abortion, the 2nd Amendment, and other issues which affect the lives of millions of Americans. The stakes couldn’t be any higher for the future of the Supreme Court, and we cannot afford to let political games get in the way of this decision. Friend, America can’t afford to get this wrong – and that’s why I need to know where you stand.Do we let the Constitution or the Left decide this? name: Bill Olson
subject: As the Left taunts Trump, let's step up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

Hi Peter,

I pray for the President and First Lady to make a full recovery- and for the extreme Left to be defeated this year!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I won because I support the President, and I will bring his fight to the liberals in my crucial Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag
!

The Left wishing people dead isn't new. They have been doing this for years now- and ESPECIALLY to President Trump!

For years, Trump Derangement Syndrome has been real- and widespread among the extreme Left.

I would have thought Nancy Pelosi and the far Left would have acted like real human beings for a change.... I guess not.

The Democrats quickly went from bemoaning President Trump’s disregard for Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s dying wish to wishing death on the president.

And if you think the venomous hatred was only spewed by basement-dwelling Twitter trolls, you’re mistaken. All across the country, wealthy celebrities and woke blue checkmarks could not hide their ghoulish glee at the president’s recent coronavirus diagnosis.

Hillary Clinton’s former spokeswoman, Zara Rahim, tweeted, “It’s been against my moral identity to tweet this for the past four years, but, I hope he dies.”

I wonder if Zara has a Love Trumps Hate bumper sticker on her car.

The Los Angeles Times published a piece titled, “When Reagan was shot, the country rallied around, but he hadn’t spent months downplaying assassins.”

How many of their readers have “Hate has no home here” signs on their lawn?

Actor Tom Arnold shared Trump aide Hope Hicks’ personal cell phone number in a since-deleted tweet. “Silent thoughts & prayers aren’t enough for national treasure Hope Hicks. She needs to hear them.”

Tom must have momentarily forgotten the sacred liberal mantra, “when they go low, we go high”.

Due to this glaring hypocrisy, I have a modest request for the tolerant left. No, I don’t expect liberals to condemn Zara’s repugnant words — after all, Republicans are the only group expected to disavow miscreants. Nor do I expect the gatekeepers at Twitter to suspend Tom Arnold’s account.

My plea to liberals is much simpler: Stop lecturing us on how Biden will restore moral leadership to America. Joe Biden’s moral compass is about as reliable as the numerical figures he rattles off at his campaign stops.

These hard Leftists are made from the same stuff as Kathy Griffin, who "joked" about beheading the President!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

I will say this for 2020, it has exposed how deranged the Left is. These people really want Trump dead- and maybe the rest of us Trump supporters too.

Joe Biden has the nerve to moralize to us, but his supporters have been burning cities and killing people, and hoping the President dead, all year!

We have no choice. We MUST win this year, or people who wish us harm will literally be holding the reins of power.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

The President is down for a couple weeks- but we are not! It's time for us to step up and win this race for him.

Think how much he's done for us. He brought our country back! Tens of millions of jobs created. The Supreme Court justices. Tax cuts. Justice reform.

Now let's step up and win it for him!

I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

Trump needs Florida. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade. If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. That's why we must win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag
today? We need to stay up on TV- and we need your help this week to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iAn5HOIiMF6OuRU&b=ewhlrPD3PntWc7ffjekzag
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The key to this election
body:
This campaign needs to put up 5,000 more “Laura Loomer for Congress” yard signs here in Florida’s 21st District.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396030-932730-5226590-d33ce5fbb9-ad82908f2b)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396030-932730-5226590-d33ce5fbb9-ad82908f2b) This campaign needs to put up 5,000 more “Laura Loomer for Congress” yard signs here in Florida’s 21st District.

[**$15 helps us print, assemble, and place 10 more signs right away... will you pitch in?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396030-932730-5226590-d33ce5fbb9-ad82908f2b)

[**Please help us reach our goal of 5,000 yard signs by chipping in $15, $30, or even $60 right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396030-932730-5226590-d33ce5fbb9-ad82908f2b)

Florida voters are pretty tuned into politics... most people know where I stand, and where my far-left opponent Lois Frankel stands.

But I’ll be honest: in every Presidential election year, many voters only vote for President, and sometimes they don’t vote for the down-ticket races like mine. Some voters will even just check a box for a name they recognize without knowing much about the candidate.

That’s why decades-long incumbents like my opponent always have a slight advantage... they’ve been around so long that people simply recognize their name.

We have a lot of catching up to do... and the best way to do that? **Put “LAURA LOOMER” in big letters on every street corner and in front of every house.**

**But I need your help to raise the $7,500 we need to print 5,000 more signs before Election Day.**

[**$15 helps us print, assemble, and place 10 more signs... $30 does 20, $60 gets us 40, and so forth.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396030-932730-5226590-d33ce5fbb9-ad82908f2b)

[**Can I count you in for just $15 or more right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396030-932730-5226590-d33ce5fbb9-ad82908f2b)

Thanks for your help!

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump ‘Doing Really Well,’ Could Be Released From Hospital Soon, His Doctor Says
body:
President Trump could be released from Walter Reed Medical Center, where he’s being treated for the Coronavirus, as early as this afternoon | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=184411e0d3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump ‘Doing Really Well,’ Could Be Released From Hospital Soon, His Doctor Says**

President Trump could be released from Walter Reed Medical Center, where he’s being treated for the Coronavirus, as early as this afternoon, Rachel del Guidice reports for _The Daily Signal_.

“The fact of the matter is, is that he is doing really well,” said Dr. Sean Conley, the President’s physician. “And as the team said, if everything continues to go well, we’re going to start discharge planning back to the White House.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a10749e99a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| The Constitution states that “no religious test shall ever be required as a Qualification to any Office or public Trust under the United States.” Yet “during the 2017 confirmation hearings for her current appointment to the 7th Circuit Court of Appeals, [Judge Amy Coney] Barrett faced harsh questioning from Judiciary Committee Democrats about her Catholic faith and beliefs,” Mary Vought writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bc6f0fb760&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The private U.S. economy added 877,000 new jobs in September, but you’d think from the coverage that this was bad news. While the pace of hiring has slowed since the summer, the economy and labor market still have plenty of growth momentum . . . The economic recovery will continue and broaden if politicians allow it,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a6004641d&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Addressing Sickle Cell Disease is one of the many ways President Trump’s Healthcare Plan is providing Americans with better care. For too many, suffering and shortened lives seem inevitable . . . We are determined to change this,” Assistant HHS Secretary Admiral Brett Giroir and Deputy Assistant to the President Ja’Ron Smith write for the [Black News Channel](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5234148d4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2668a54eca&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=352cb2db14&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c179515d01)
---

Friend,

I just left Walter Reed after receiving incredible care and I’m feeling really good! In fact, I feel better than I did 20 years ago.

I’m telling you: Don’t be afraid of Covid. Don’t let it dominate your life! This is the greatest country in the world, and under the Trump Administration, we have developed some really great drugs and knowledge. WE WILL BEAT THIS, TOGETHER!

The love and support from Americans from all over the world has been incredible and is something I’ll never forget. When I saw many great Patriots outside of the hospital supporting me, I knew I had to drive by and thank them!

Now, I am fired up and ready to KEEP FIGHTING FOR YOU! This is the FINAL STRETCH of the Election and we can’t take any days off.

We have come a long way these past three and a half years, but we’re not done yet. Important steps need to be taken if we’re going to Make America Great Again, and the only way to do that is if we WIN FOUR MORE YEARS.

I know you want to secure another VICTORY just as much as I do, which is why I’m prepared to do something HUGE:

subject: Re: Amy Klobuchar invite

body:
Hi Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw the email my team sent out last week inviting you to my campaign's virtual women's event on Wednesday, October 7th!
This year, I'm honored to be joined by my friend and colleague, Senator Amy Klobuchar. You can learn more about the event below or by emailing kelly@voteforlinda.com.
I'd love to see you there!
\-- _Linda S anchez_
\---------- Forwarded message ---------

Next Wednesday, we're honored to have Senator Amy Klobuchar join Congresswoman Sanchez in conversation as part of our annual women's event.
Now, all we're missing is YOU!

It’s always the same story from the Democrat Party and ‘moderate’ Democrats like Jackie Gordon. Every year they tell us they only want to raise taxes for the “rich” and help the Middle Class. But does that hold up?
**Democrats want:**

_**Single-Payer Government-Mandated Healthcare**_ ~ **$3.2 Trillion/Per Year**
_**The ‘Green New Deal’**_ ~ **$9.3 Trillion/Year**
_**“Universal” College**_ ~ **$79 Billion/Per Year**
_**‘Universal Basic Income**_ ~ **$2.8 Trillion/Per Year**

**U.S. Federal Government Collects ~ $3.5 Trillion/Per Year in Taxes.**
**Democrats want to spend 5X what the U.S. Government already collects in taxes and spends each year!** Even if Democrats took every single dollar from every billionaire in this country, it wouldn’t be enough to pay for even these **4** radical policies!
[**Stop Democrats’ Attack on the Middle Class **](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=5103856d197846f885e11713bafb566d&_e=qwpuQA5sjUYQtToppMqa9xEZ_yhxLHlrXkc2P3bw49h1t7KKPfZ7h74-kWNmzhfHBZrMNzddBqnlAhWaNrsqc9WPzL3y6DV1SVk8dHDGij3knfo7XIKUY7ApBDAO4t4WPNTKt5eujbTjauUrjLCzC8WC0bR7XSUILfovdJphlFqrGpgJvimXh0qTfaazgpwr2JAg1oFiKN5c4VoJQDixi0BOcH7RqYonmsF-m-PGcy_oa_EE6c3yZMdayEGoxZTn5HDBvGSy3Ld1r4t-aT54P9vZaY1iB5v5ioEx5mEp6kV3cdgP6ySTYG7oGZfwXzQNViTLTMsRBmUMEZtAuvuutNYTtWcwI_lzrE9rH-_sL6-WWCarHH1GNVug7oTSwI_Uegcvo2TFPuPsbmHSMpORvWJbetABPEViJE_ov5vOL-aZll60V7NeZx6lawy8p5Dw)
Democrats know this; they just don’t want to tell you that _**EVERYONE**_ , especially the middle class, will be footing the bill for their terrible socialist plans. Well, except themselves, of course. clean_body: I’ve just released my latest video exposing how Jackie Gordon and her liberal Democrat friends continue to tax the Middle Class while enriching... | | Peter, I’ve just released my latest video exposing how Jackie Gordon and her liberal Democrat friends continue to tax the Middle Class while enriching themselves. It’s always the same story from the Democrat Party and ‘moderate’ Democrats like Jackie Gordon. Every year they tell us they only want to raise taxes for the “rich” and help the Middle Class. But does that hold up? Democrats want: Single-Payer Government-Mandated Healthcare ~ $3.2 Trillion/Per Year The ‘Green New Deal’ ~ $9.3 Trillion/Year “Universal” College ~ $79 Billion/Per Year ‘Universal Basic Income ~ $2.8 Trillion/Per Year U.S. Federal Government Collects ~ $3.5 Trillion/Per Year in Taxes. Democrats want to spend 5X what the U.S. Government already collects in taxes and spends each year! Even if Democrats took every single dollar from every billionaire in this country, it wouldn’t be enough to pay for even these 4 radical policies! Democrats know this; they just don’t want to tell you that EVERYONE , especially the middle class, will be footing the bill for their terrible socialist plans. Well, except themselves, of course. Gordon and her liberal colleagues didn’t miss an opportunity to give themselves a pay raise. Peter, my opponent, Jackie Gordon, is no different. She wants you to believe that she’s always been a moderate who will cut taxes for the middle class. But in fact, she has already raised taxes on Long Island families while giving herself a pay raise! Jackie Gordon’s stated stances on the issues are purposely vague and generic because she knows that her REAL policies are too liberal for Long Island! clean_body: | = | | Hey friends, Mike here! My team and I have been working hard and putting together a game plan for the next four weeks. But while we’re planning for the future of this campaign, we’ve been doing our best to keep in mind not just where we’re headed, but how incredible it is that we got where we are today. With your help, we’ve built a movement right in our part of Texas. A movement that stands for truth, justice, and equality, and a movement that has withstood three years of bad-faith attacks by a cash-stacked incumbent. The resilience of the people standing alongside me has kept me going through it all. Now, we just need to go a little further. We’ve closed the gap and made this a statistically tied race.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = It’s been my privilege and my honor to fight alongside you every day of this campaign, and to gain support near and far. And together, we can kick a 15-year incumbent to the curb and get to work for the working people of TX-10! Thanks team, Mike | | If you'd like to support Mike Siegel for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Ben Ray has been lying about me and my campaign. First, he lied about my support for covering pre-existing conditions, even though I’ve been clear since Day 1 of this campaign that I will always fight for those with pre-existing conditions. Then, he accused me of being “anti-science”, even though I spent my whole career in science, while Ben Ray has been playing politics in DC. New Mexicans want a Senator who knows them and their communities, not another partisan DC politician like Ben Ray Lujan. That’s why I am excited to release our new ad, where I fight back against Ben Ray’s lies. Click on the button or video below to watch my new ad! | Despite our hard work to fight back against Ben Ray’s lies, far too many New Mexicans still think Ben Ray is telling the truth. I need your help to keep this ad running so we can show New Mexico what I really stand for. If you can, | | | Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Ben Ray has been lying about my campaign and we are fighting back. to watch my new ad where I expose Ben Ray’s lies and correct the record. body:
President Trump is tweeting about Virginia. Again.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da77/53d9897e/55b0dd41/1c88eb87/734523494/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vatweet?refcode=20201005_f_1_nd__849__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")

[Chip in to show that Virginia is NOT in play.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da77/53d9897e/55b0dd41/1c88eb86/734523494/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vatweet?refcode=20201005_f_1_nd__849__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---

Derek --

In February, Mark's GOP opponent told a group of supporters: "I've met with the president's political strategy people. They think that Virginia is in play. They're excited about it."

Then, just this morning -- just 29 days until Election Day -- Trump tweeted that he thinks Virginia is "IN PLAY."

We're four weeks away from Election Day. This election is about who we are and who we want to be as a country. This is our opportunity to build our country back better after four years of Donald Trump. We're facing record unemployment, a global pandemic, and a national reckoning with racism in our country. Your vote in this election is about who you think is fit to lead us forward.

[**If you can, please chip in to help us show Trump and the GOP that Virginia is staying blue in 2020.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da77/53d9897e/55b0dd41/1c88eb85/734523494/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg0OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vatweet?refcode=20201005_f_1_nd__849__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

Thank you for your support! Let's go out and win.
-- Team Warner

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Jeanne Shaheen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
In 2016, Donald Trump only lost New Hampshire by less than half a percentage point. So the GOP has made this state a top target for 2020. And Jeanne's opponent is a self-funding multi-millionaire who' | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251df/45c30650/1c12c0ced/66e8997c/1942058722/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
It's never been more clear that Democrats need to take back the Senate.

But that's going to be virtually impossible if we don't re-elect my friend Senator Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire this November.

In 2016, Donald Trump only lost New Hampshire by less than half a percentage point. So the GOP has made this state a top target for 2020. And Jeanne's opponent is a self-funding multi-millionaire who's already dumped over $4 million into the race.

Jeanne can fight back and win -- but only with a strong grassroots movement fighting by her side. And that's where this team comes in.

**[If you're able to, will you pitch in to help re-elect Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire and support Warren Democrats across the country? $2 or whatever you can contribute would go a long way.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251df/45c30650/1c12c0ced/66e8997f/1942058722/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNoYWhlZW4iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVzAxRl9FR1JfRU5EX0VfMjAyMDEwMDVfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-shaheen?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW01F_EGR_END_E_20201005_V1S2_P")**

Whether it's going toe to toe with the Trump administration or standing up to giant pharmaceutical companies, Jeanne gets the job done for the people of New Hampshire and our entire nation.

Together, we have fought to ease the crushing burden of student loan debt and tackle the opioid epidemic head on. And during this time of crisis, Jeanne is fighting like never before to protect small businesses, hospitals, and frontline workers.

Jeanne has a backbone of steel, and I have been honored to fight alongside her. Let's make sure that we power Jeanne to victory and send her back to Washington.

**[If it makes sense for you right now, please split a contribution between Jeanne Shaheen's re-election and mine-- so we can take back the Senate and elect Democrats across the country who put people first.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251df/45c30650/1c12c0ced/66e8997f/1942058722/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LXNoYWhlZW4iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVzAxRl9FR1JfRU5EX0VfMjAyMDEwMDVfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-shaheen?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW01F_EGR_END_E_20201005_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: In 2016, Donald Trump only lost New Hampshire by less than half a percentage point. So the GOP has made this state a top target for 2020. And Jeanne's opponent is a self-funding multi-millionaire who' | | | "" It's never been more clear that Democrats need to take back the Senate. But that's going to be virtually impossible if we don't re-elect my friend Senator Jeanne Shaheen in New Hampshire this November. In 2016, Donald Trump only lost New Hampshire by less than half a percentage point. So the GOP has made this state a top target for 2020. And Jeanne's opponent is a self-funding multi-millionaire who's already dumped over $4 million into the race. Jeanne can fight back and win -- but only with a strong grassroots movement fighting by her side. And that's where this team comes in. "" Whether it's going toe to toe with the Trump administration or standing up to giant pharmaceutical companies, Jeanne gets the job done for the people of New Hampshire and our entire nation. Together, we have fought to ease the crushing burden of student loan debt and tackle the opioid epidemic head on. And during this time of crisis, Jeanne is fighting like never before to protect small businesses, hospitals, and frontline workers. Jeanne has a backbone of steel, and I have been honored to fight alongside her. Let's make sure that we power Jeanne to victory and send her back to Washington. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: FW: [RESPONSE MISSING] Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
There is so much on the line in November... so we’re reaching out to patriots like yourself to ask that you commit to casting your ballot to defend..... Peter, There is so much on the line in November... so we’re reaching out to patriots like yourself to ask that you commit to casting your ballot to defend our conservative values. America needs you, Peter, to stop Joe Biden and Kamala Harris... To make sure that we don’t lose the U.S. Senate... And to make sure that the Liberal Left doesn’t replace our free market system that has given us the strongest economy in the world, with higher taxes, more government interference in our lives, and even SOCIALISM! So today, we’re asking you to take a simple, yet important action... To commit to voting in November. Will you pledge to vote now? [**TAKE THE PLEDGE**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_e=XCyKJ6Kyv8ucHNXk9jZeBZtZy7A3bMJoww2pgqON23Av2ZUxCu7p2cdGPlo80XY1IlK2SEgJlqIu1oz4Afr7EGnHWKBvfhCewrqq_ketCqdf_f-s4F0dENg9ZJcI--WF2GzyAoPBe6sUx7EbToGOW83BEx9dKvveX4rouTjfSAzxVgA1-LqdDBXvWK5rGnljObLk4FYcTr1oLwz43zKAAkcb_1Zj3gxx3cRzAL_EoP13QVIiIIRp-J14v66FHI6no6HxzkmeeXtpXCMJRMjIm2XQcjrRm06SS2NP9_eHONugVbuwE3_smhy-6js5tHZyEjWuZBir-yXGRkYP0AZ51r8Iqt-g6Mo2qUk9Zfl6FIdmY-dZkk_AnWqJT-BIhHKpJdU25N4p94OIS7zDZ_EYZYoAYQXbQJBJeMsn42TL2oddkIHtOka2m7Z6aiXZbTh_) [**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_e=XCyKJ6Kyv8ucHNXk9jZeBZtZy7A3bMJoww2pgqON23Av2ZUxCu7p2cdGPlo80XY1IlK2SEgJlqIu1oz4Afr7EGnHWKBvfhCewrqq_ketCqdf_f-s4F0dENg9ZJcI--WF2GzyAoPBe6sUx7EbToGOW83BEx9dKvveX4rouTjfSAzxVgA1-LqdDBXvWK5rGnljObLk4FYcTr1oLwz43zKAAvPzsli7JTptj5JBwdfrZkU8kzkBD9pWEQVP6GcUa3Rm23s2eccm8JUpRhJWwILvpJQwafEHpj6WqBeP01bOR5kOyZzyU8JBV-0tcQ5qOKvj0ZRIq1FEDDAxrObIN92tvgJv-RJT6i2G-yfjMSq7vsvsTGXyoW86QeqqAQz2gDciTfjAvE3XUxAyX09KwZy-w4NQCLaHCy25jfB94MEVSuduy18Rzv45-NBjhorvtig6) Every vote counts and every vote matters. We need YOUR commitment that you are going to do your civic duty and cast your ballot! **[Will you take the pledge immediately?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_e=XCyKJ6Kyv8ucHNXk9jZeBZtZy7A3bMJoww2pgqON23Av2ZUxCu7p2cdGPlo80XY1IlK2SEgJlqIu1oz4Afr7EGnHWKBvfhCewrqq_ketCqdf_f-s4F0dENg9ZJcI--WF2GzyAoPBe6sUx7EbToGOW83BEx9dKvveX4rouTjfSAzxVgA1-LqdDBXvWK5rGnljObLk4FYcTr1oLwz43zKAApzulljGnbex3r_KSIOf7Ffa9aWurYmEoKeDcx7XOLP4alWCBRpTSgYfv3NOiGc3m0_r1t1LszGHyPhmeHvcu3Sz93dvVBNGbGTgeOvFacxOP-eQRsohSDUqS3cq2MS4hnoE-eA-7ZbolXMFxVOEoZbBxh_89njQcpr5iCP6yxczzUh1QbOu9Q2kUK12Zx5ySLUHfuE0rHN25AF9GIxvSwiMSimSvBHZZ4anMl5q2PNz)** Team Portman

\---------Forwarded Message Below------ Peter, in not much time at all our nation will wake up on November 3rd and get ready to cast their vote. They (and I hope you,) will be making one of the most impactful decisions that will carry our nation through the next four years. I think the choice is pretty clear: ❌ Anarchy, violence, one size fits all single payer health care, Green New Deal

✅ Freedom, liberty, protected borders, low taxes, protected constitutional rights Peter, I want to ask you a very simple question: Can I count on your commitment to get out and vote on this November 3rd? I need you to respond now by adding your name: [**YES! Count me in to vote**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_e=XCyKJ6Kyv8ucHNXk9jZeBZtZy7A3bMJoww2pgqON23Av2ZUxCu7p2cdGPlo80XY1IlK2SEgJlqIu1oz4Afr7EGnHWKBvfhCewrqq_ketCqdf_f-s4F0dENg9ZJcI--WF2GzyAoPBe6sUx7EbToGOW83BEx9dKvveX4rouTjfSAzxVgA1-LqdDBXvWK5rGnljObLk4FYcTr1oLwz43zKAAhDuvVFtBPr11lLpCHVqsB-J79ZSq16HwB-o14GLueFSm-ERVd3oIG1bEfPmfLeXR_sc_8tkbCIAsbE4FdiZDmravtk55tretbUyYs5q631enXuUNi0VF43afw6JcMND_165DGEEc4zgiESnMS3AvwbiFxpyUbOPw3o-nFsWf_lDogiDM8Ex7aJAUw7eRoWhHtEFLwlHrTMXuC_eOS0oHX52V7AqEgBQY7_dc4BSqipQ) Peter, it’s an immense freedom that we are all able to vote for our values, our priorities, and for the things that matter MOST. But, it’s not enough to just be vocal about the things we are passionate about. We must put our freedoms into action and cast our ballots! [**Will you sign your name to make a firm commitment to voting in November? I really want to see your name on the list, Peter!**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_e=XCyKJ6Kyv8ucHNXk9jZeBZtZy7A3bMJoww2pgqON23Av2ZUxCu7p2cdGPlo80XY1IlK2SEgJlqIu1oz4Afr7EGnHWKBvfhCewrqq_ketCqdf_f-s4F0dENg9ZJcI--WF2GzyAoPBe6sUx7EbToGOW83BEx9dKvveX4rouTjfSAzxVgA1-LqdDBXvWK5rGnljObLk4FYcTr1oLwz43zKAAn8XSRcabsjQqNX4auwQdwksduJaHT4S2ctp531mmAW60WkqikQ0MFvXWhLJfxPJd37yL3pGHw5hodDONUgbSs_2TmglhuhJyU6rsZVU0-G81GSut6vb0aq56MVCLpcnTG0D8G1A4ul_BCqx9EsRf8GBfyeEkBIi8dTrO-TqtZmpcpNnqfd_5Qa-S6p05hOLB4MeVoWFXufGhuB2XOAmSoM15a__JU15Z1HH5PNlKajG) [**COMMIT TO VOTING**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_e=XCyKJ6Kyv8ucHNXk9jZeBZtZy7A3bMJoww2pgqON23Av2ZUxCu7p2cdGPlo80XY1IlK2SEgJlqIu1oz4Afr7EGnHWKBvfhCewrqq_ketCqdf_f-s4F0dENg9ZJcI--WF2GzyAoPBe6sUx7EbToGOW83BEx9dKvveX4rouTjfSAzxVgA1-LqdDBXvWK5rGnljObLk4FYcTr1oLwz43zKAAunvCSH6SO-ivNpsUbHYk8UhDSy3i4Rx4NrsgbY09Fl5R_qXSlXN-_MrovUJHBgyWybVNlGZ_B0JdZ22dxFQhD8ySSEyDecSk5pjpAs0xp4Cm6mk7ptt4Vcz44hu8XuUkNS3qg_Xy_dsjAaD8sZid4o2xXx9t8bsEJcUwd-68lkcX2RwaWGiZNC2rVh2qrOlnk5-S0Q9mKjn9em8oZt2JspXhezCSZLukP83pQVw7N6N) Rob Portman Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links.robportman.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_s=cb5bdd49411c428d9d6f76ae915e8e82&_t=_6cbTYu-5JYs4TyJLc4c9S4Jasre6kEiQjsqD2IsEkYwa9znQrxklqsg05qbjzkmNig5DrJbnr-c8zkFNIOsOXAIQOkxtWNf0dd8ZcgQnxOdyyitLuuB5jxnBVXNAvwG018gDn-kmDIdzNd-pX-3zMmOtaKybyx4wCho1rcVYD0%3D)

subject: Judicial Watch Sues California to Prevent Enforcement of Race, Ethnicity, Sexual Preference and Transgender Status Quotas for Corporate Boards of Directors
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a lawsuit in the Superior Court of the State of California County of Los Angeles on behalf of three California taxpayers to prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979 (AB 979), which Governor Gavin Newsom signed into law September 30, 2020.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Oct 05, 2020
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20680&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVubi1jb3VudGllcy1pbmNvcnJlY3Qtdm90ZXItaW5mby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0) | **[Judicial Watch: Pennsylvania Counties Admit They Gave Incorrect Voter Roll Information to Federal Government – Disclose Conflicting Numbers of Inactive Voters to Court](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20680&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVubi1jb3VudGllcy1pbmNvcnJlY3Qtdm90ZXItaW5mby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0)** In recent court filings, Pennsylvania admitted it had certified incorrect data to the EAC. The State alleged unverified, revised figures for Bucks, Chester, and Delaware counties. Those three counties also alleged their own unverified, revised figures, which differed, however, from those provided by the State. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20680&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVubi1jb3VudGllcy1pbmNvcnJlY3Qtdm90ZXItaW5mby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20716&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1jYWxpLXF1b3Rhcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0) | **[Judicial Watch Sues California to Prevent Enforcement of Race, Ethnicity, Sexual Preference and Transgender Status Quotas for Corporate Boards of Directors](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20716&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1jYWxpLXF1b3Rhcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0)** Judicial Watch announced today that it filed a lawsuit in the Superior Court of the State of California County of Los Angeles on behalf of three California taxpayers to prevent California from enforcing Assembly Bill 979 (AB 979), which Governor Gavin Newsom signed into law September 30, 2020. The bill requires that boards of directors of California-based, publicly held domestic or foreign corporations satisfy racial, ethnicity, sexual preference and transgender status quotas by the end of the 2021 calendar year. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20716&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1jYWxpLXF1b3Rhcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20661&F=H&) | **[Soros Funds Campaign of L.A. Prosecutor Candidate who Vows Lock Up Fewer Criminals](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20661&F=H&)** Leftwing billionaire George Soros just donated $1.5 million to help the nation’s most populous county elect a Black Lives Matter-endorsed prosecutor who promises to lock up fewer criminals. The sizable contribution to former San Francisco District Attorney George Gascon’s campaign for Los Angeles District Attorney is part of a broader effort by Soros to place leftists in local prosecutors’ offices around the country. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20661&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20717&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanVkZ2UtcmVqZWN0cy1oaHMtZWZmb3J0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0) | **[Judge Rejects HHS Effort to Stall Release of Fauci Emails Until After Election – Orders Initial Production this Month](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51629&L=20717&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanVkZ2UtcmVqZWN0cy1oaHMtZWZmb3J0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMDA1MjAyMzU0)** U.S. District Court Judge Dabney L. Friedrich on September 22 ordered HHS to begin producing 300 pages of potentially responsive records per month beginning on October 21. In a September 21 court filing, HHS said the agency could begin producing 300 pages of responsive records to the Daily Caller News Foundation beginning on November 30, eight months after receiving the Daily Caller’s request under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). name: Team Hicks
subject: What Josh said
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Hey everyone,
Just a few minutes ago, voters finally had a chance to hear directly from the candidates in the first debate of the campaign.
Here's what Josh had to say in his closing argument:
"I’m running this race as a kid from Fleming County who served his country as a Marine, who served his community as a police officer, and now who serves his clients in the best way he can. Because service means something to me. It’s been a huge part of my life, for a long time.
I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of lying politicians. I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of folks trying to strip away coverage from people with preexisting conditions. I am sick and tired of politicians selling us out to pharmaceutical companies, to Wall Street, to payday lenders. I’m sick and tired of having to listen to the stories of folks who have tried to approach our Representative in Congress and tell him "the ACA saved my life."
I’m sick and tired of hearing these stories, but let’s be very clear. This race is not about me. It’s not about him. This race is about you, and who you think will represent you the best in the US Congress, so I ask for your vote between now and November 3."
Now, we’re glad we had a chance to set the record straight tonight. Andy Barr has been invited to four more debates or forums — but he hasn’t said yes to a single one.
Can you chip in $4, $14, or whatever you can afford now to help us keep getting our message to voters? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hicks-october?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201005debaterecap_TH_all_ld_l1&amount=14] Folks in the 6th District deserve to hear from the candidates seeking their votes. And candidates should be willing to speak about and stand behind their records.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

PS: Missed the debate? Check out Team Hicks on Twitter [https://twitter.com/joshhicksky] or Josh’s Facebook page [https://www.facebook.com/JoshHicksKY] for updates!
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent the hardworking, everyday folks of Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington, not corporations or dark-money donors.
That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a contribution today.

clean_body: Hey everyone, Just a few minutes ago, voters finally had a chance to hear directly from the candidates in the first debate of the campaign. Here's what Josh had to say in his closing argument: "I’m running this race as a kid from Fleming County who served his country as a Marine, who served his community as a police officer, and now who serves his clients in the best way he can. Because service means something to me. It’s been a huge part of my life, for a long time. I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of lying politicians. I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of folks trying to strip away coverage from people with preexisting conditions. I am sick and tired of politicians selling us out to pharmaceutical companies, to Wall Street, to payday lenders. I’m sick and tired of having to listen to the stories of folks who have tried to approach our Representative in Congress and tell him "the ACA saved my life." I’m sick and tired of hearing these stories, but let’s be very clear. This race is not about me. It’s not about him. This race is about you, and who you think will represent you the best in the US Congress, so I ask for your vote between now and November 3." Now, we’re glad we had a chance to set the record straight tonight. Andy Barr has been invited to four more debates or forums — but he hasn’t said yes to a single one. Can you chip in $4, $14, or whatever you can afford now to help us keep getting our message to voters? [] Folks in the 6th District deserve to hear from the candidates seeking their votes. And candidates should be willing to speak about and stand behind their records. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $14 ➞ [] DONATE $25 ➞ [] DONATE $44 ➞ [] DONATE $100 ➞ [] DONATE $250 ➞ [] OTHER AMOUNT ➞ [] Thanks, Team Hicks PS: Missed the debate? He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington, not corporations or dark-money donors. | | Big news, Peter -- Vice President Joe Biden has endorsed our campaign!

This election is a fight to restore the soul of our nation, protect our health care, and put power back in the hands of working families -- and it's going to take each and every one of us.

Joe and I both have a vision of the future that puts people first -- where everyone has access to quality, affordable health care, where we will recover from the COVID‐19 pandemic, where we will take action to fight against climate change. **[Will you join Vice President Biden in supporting my campaign by making a donation right now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cad/7f51f7bc/44a37b2c/4efbaccf/1230805817/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jbe?refcode=email_20201005.3nd__2268__&amount=10")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cad/7f51f7bc/44a37b2c/4efbaccf/1230805817/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-jbe?refcode=email_20201005.3nd__2268__&amount=10")

**With less than a month left before Election Day, and even less time before early voting, we have a lot of work left to do!**

Our campaign is growing real momentum. Hundreds of thousands of donors joined our grassroots army, and our message is reaching millions of voters across Texas. **That 's why multiple recent polls put us within the margin of error of winning this election!**

But we need to make the most of the remaining weeks by continuing to push our message to every Texan we can, and in a state that has more than 29 million people, twenty media markets, and 268,000 square miles that takes _a lot_ of resources.

**Every dollar you pitch in helps strengthen this campaign, and the stronger our campaign is, the more we can help flip seats up and down the ballot from the presidency to the House to local races.**

| | Dear Friend, We're going to make this quick because there's no time to waste. Today, October 5th, is the last day to register to vote or update your registration in Georgia for the November 3rd General Election. Your vote is your voice. Make sure you have a say in this election. Click [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b5/34a064cc/1a0ff614/702cbc9/1143454588/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcome.do#no-back-button") to check your registration, update your registration, or register to vote. Then, text [this link](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b5/34a064cc/1a0ff614/702cbc9/1143454588/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcome.do#no-back-button") to 5 of your friends who you think may not be registered to vote at their current address. This is the most important election of our lifetimes. Check your registration today to ensure you can take part. For more information, visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4b5/34a064cc/1a0ff614/702cbd6/1143454588/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com"). -Team Fair Fight Action |
